label: Tabs
description: Tabbed content panels with clickable tab headers. Each tab has label and rich text content. Use for organizing content into switchable views — product details, documentation, comparisons. Layout: horizontal tab bar with active accent underline, content panel below. Three style variants.

tabs.label: Description
tabs.content:
Our flagship product combines cutting-edge technology with intuitive design. Built for professionals who demand reliability and performance, it features a military-grade aluminum chassis and a stunning 4K display.

Every detail has been carefully crafted to deliver an exceptional user experience from the moment you open the box.

tabs.label: Specifications
tabs.content:
• Processor: 12-core ARM architecture
  • Memory: 32GB unified memory
  • Storage: 1TB NVMe SSD
  • Display: 15.6" 4K OLED, 120Hz
  • Battery: 100Wh, up to 18 hours
  • Weight: 1.8 kg

tabs.label: Reviews
tabs.content:
4.8 out of 5 stars (2,341 reviews)

"Best laptop I've ever owned. The display is incredible and battery life is outstanding." — Sarah K.
"Perfect for creative professionals. Handles everything I throw at it." — Marcus T.
